'''sajoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnofiber|pycnofiber]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-j-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnofiber|pycnofiber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sajoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæjeteth|sæjeteth]] || [[word:sæjetej|sæjetej]] || [[word:sæjetesh|sæjetesh]] || [[word:sæjete|sæjete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sajojototh|sajojototh]] || [[word:sajojotoj|sajojotoj]] || [[word:sajojotosh|sajojotosh]] || [[word:sajojoto|sajojoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sajototh|sajototh]] || [[word:sajotoj|sajotoj]] || [[word:sajotosh|sajotosh]] || [[word:sajoto|sajoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sajoftoth|sajoftoth]] || [[word:sajoftoj|sajoftoj]] || [[word:sajoftosh|sajoftosh]] || [[word:sajoftof|sajoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sajototho|sajototho]] || [[word:sajotojo|sajotojo]] || [[word:sajotosho|sajotosho]] || [[word:sajotoko|sajotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sajototh|sajototh]] || [[word:sajotoj|sajotoj]] || [[word:sajotosh|sajotosh]] || [[word:sajoto|sajoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sajotothol|sajotothol]] || [[word:sajotojol|sajotojol]] || [[word:sajotoshol|sajotoshol]] || [[word:sajotokol|sajotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sajotothotho|sajotothotho]] || [[word:sajotojojo|sajotojojo]] || [[word:sajotoshosho|sajotoshosho]] || [[word:sajotoko|sajotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sajotothon|sajotothon]] || [[word:sajotojon|sajotojon]] || [[word:sajotoshon|sajotoshon]] || [[word:sajotokon|sajotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sajotothoro|sajotothoro]] || [[word:sajotojoro|sajotojoro]] || [[word:sajotoshoro|sajotoshoro]] || [[word:sajotokoro|sajotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
